title: Office Romance
shortSynopsis: Jennifer Lopez and Brett Goldstein star in a saucy rom-com about a secret office romance and the chaos two workaholics get into following their hearts.

title: Maternal Instinct
shortSynopsis: Police pull over a woman who claims she just gave birth. But the baby — and the blood — aren't hers. Twisted lies unravel in this true-crime documentary.

title: Swapped
shortSynopsis: A tiny woodland creature and a majestic bird suddenly swap bodies, forcing them to team up to survive the wildest adventure of their lives.

title: The Murder of Rachel Nickell
shortSynopsis: A young mother is killed in broad daylight on London's Wimbledon Common — in front of her toddler. This documentary examines the yearslong murder case.

title: Fast Charlie
shortSynopsis: After a rival kills his mob boss and longtime friend, veteran "fixer" Charlie has a target on his back. But instead of hiding out, he seeks revenge.

title: KPop Demon Hunters
shortSynopsis: When K-pop superstars Rumi, Mira and Zoey aren't selling out stadiums, they're using their secret powers to protect their fans from supernatural threats.

title: David
shortSynopsis: A young shepherd prophesied to become king embarks on a legendary journey, guided by faith to overcome powerful enemies and claim his destiny.

title: Goat
shortSynopsis: A young goat chases his dream of playing professional roarball as he revitalizes a legendary team and proves his small stature packs a big punch.

title: Ticket to Paradise
shortSynopsis: Determined to sabotage their daughter's upcoming wedding in Bali, a long-divorced couple agrees to a truce — and begins to see eye-to-eye again.

title: Bee Movie
shortSynopsis: A worker bee stuck in a dead-end job sues humanity when he learns that they've been stealing bees' honey all along.

title: Colors Of Evil: Black
shortSynopsis: When a young boy goes missing in a small sleepy town, a newly reassigned prosecutor begins to uncover unexpected links to an old missing persons case.

title: The Marked Woman
shortSynopsis: When a woman is found in a shipping container with no memory of who she is, two detectives race to figure out her identity — and who wants her dead.

title: Bhooth Bangla
shortSynopsis: When a man inherits a palace, he plans to host his sister's wedding there — but the venue's dark past threatens to ruin the celebration.

title: Maa Behen
shortSynopsis: When trouble knocks on her door, a mother and her estranged daughters attempt to cover up a crime in a nosy colony where no secret is safe.

title: Mexico 86
shortSynopsis: Audacity, madness and pure Mexican ingenuity. In 1986, Mexico hosted the most important tournament in football against all odds. How was this feat achieved?

title: Colors of Evil: Red
shortSynopsis: When a girl's body is found on a beach in Poland's Tricity, a prosecutor teams up with the victim's mother on an impassioned quest for the truth.
Plagued by feelings of inadequacy, Sathya dreads his looming 30th birthday — until he falls in love with an ambitious woman and finds renewed purpose.

title: USA 94: Brazil's Return to Glory
shortSynopsis: This documentary revisits Brazil's quest for a fourth star, featuring interviews and never-before-seen footage shot by the players themselves.

title: Run to the West
shortSynopsis: After a funeral kidnapping ends with a car crash, four people land in a realm between life and death where they must outrun soul-hunting beasts.

title: Risa and the Wind Phone
shortSynopsis: After the disappearance of her father, 10-year-old Risa stumbles upon an out-of-service telephone booth that allows her to communicate with the dead.

title: The Witness: Limited Series
shortSynopsis: With their 2-year-old as the sole witness to her murder, Rachel Nickell's partner fights to protect him amid a flawed investigation. Based on true events.

title: Michael Jackson: The Verdict: Season 1
shortSynopsis: Told by key players who were inside the courtroom, this comprehensive documentary dissects the trial of Michael Jackson and his complex legacy.

title: Outlast: The Jungle: Season 1
shortSynopsis: On a remote tropical island, 16 players must survive the elements, outmaneuver rivals and remain part of a team for a chance to win a $1 million prize.

title: Sweet Magnolias: Season 5
shortSynopsis: With wedding bells on the horizon, the Magnolias chase a shared dream, explore the world beyond Serenity, and lift each other up amid a summer of change.

title: The Four Seasons: Season 2
shortSynopsis: The friends reunite for four new seasonal get-togethers, as they process a personal loss and embrace the regrets and reinventions of middle age.

title: Raw: 2026 - June 8, 2026
shortSynopsis: The King and Queen of the Ring Tournaments continue in Paris, France, with two First Round Fatal 4-Way Matches.

title: Nemesis: Season 1
shortSynopsis: A relentless LAPD cop becomes obsessed with taking down the master thief behind a string of daring heists — and only one can come out on top.

title: The Boroughs: Season 1
shortSynopsis: In a seemingly perfect retirement community, a crew of unlikely heroes must stop an otherworldly threat from stealing the one thing they don't have: time.

title: Tony Hinchcliffe: Man of the People
shortSynopsis: Tony Hinchcliffe takes center stage to prove no topic is too taboo and nothing is off-limits — not even the audience — in this razor-sharp special.

title: Danny Go!: Season 1
shortSynopsis: Who's ready to dance, sing and play? Join Danny Go and pals for off-the-couch adventures, brain breaks and interactive learning games kids will love.

title: Teach You a Lesson: Limited Series
shortSynopsis: When respect collapses in schools, unconventional inspectors arrive to set things right — with sharp, no-nonsense lessons you won't find in textbooks.

title: My Royal Nemesis: Limited Series
shortSynopsis: A Joseon-era villain doomed to die opens her eyes in modern-day Seoul — where a ruthless chaebol heir may be her last chance to rewrite her fate.

title: Rosario Tijeras (Mexico): Season 5
shortSynopsis: Old and new foes hunt Rosario as she and El Ángel rebuild their lives. But how do you survive when the enemy is your own flesh and blood?

title: The Polygamist: Season 1
shortSynopsis: Social media darling, Joyce, is the picture of marital perfection — until her cheating husband's conquests ignite a scandalous emotional meltdown.

title: The Evil Lawyer: Season 1
shortSynopsis: Framed for a brutal crime he didn't commit, a young attorney puts his life in the hands of a callous defense lawyer to clear his name and find the truth.

title: Berlin and the Lady with an Ermine: Limited Series
shortSynopsis: Hungry for a new heist, Berlin summons the gang to Seville and turns an ambitious duke into the victim of his own plan: to steal a Da Vinci masterpiece.

title: Viral Hit: Season 1
shortSynopsis: When he accidentally goes viral after a brawl, a weak and broke teen realizes livestreaming fights against delinquents could change his life.

title: The WONDERfools: Limited Series
shortSynopsis: A goofy group of townies stumbles into superpowers and fights rising evil as doomsday panic grows in this wild, turn-of-the-century action comedy.

title: Rafa: Season 1
shortSynopsis: As he battles for a final triumph on the court, Rafael Nadal opens up like never before about what shaped one of the greatest tennis careers of all time.

title: Losing Judgment: Season 1
shortSynopsis: After an outburst in court reveals her OCD, a brilliant lawyer must start over at a modest firm — where a new case hits unexpectedly close to home.
